title: pilosella × obornyana subsp. stricticaulis
intro: Pilosella × obornyana subsp. stricticaulis is a rare and hybrid species of flowering plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pilosella × obornyana subsp. stricticaulis include its possible use in treating various conditions, such as arthritis, eczema, and gastrointestinal issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Pilosella × obornyana subsp. stricticaulis is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its bioactive compounds for potential therapeutic applications.
